TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pongodan = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Pongodan. 397 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,040 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 58% niqan 600 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 42% niqan 440 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis47%, Paiwan1%, Bunun1%, Puyuma5%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = poŋodan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ tajtuŋsu ka alaŋ poŋodan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, paiwan*%, bunun*%, pujuma*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Pongodan = Gaga mniq Taytung Taytungsu ka alang Pongodan. 397 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,040 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 58% niqan 600 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 42% niqan 440 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis47%, Paiwan1%, Bunun1%, Puyuma5%, ni rahuq na o3%.
S.PHON: = poŋodan = gaga mniq tajtuŋ tajtuŋsu ka alaŋ poŋodan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis**%, paiwan*%, bunun*%, pujuma*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
